basic_details.job_title: VNIT Nagpur Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology Nagpur (VNIT Nagpur)
basic_details.short_information: Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology Nagpur (VNIT Nagpur) has published the Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 notification. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Deputy Director position. Candidates not exceeding 60 years of age with a minimum of 5 years of experience as a Professor, including at least 2 years as HoD/ Dean, and an outstanding academic record with notable contributions in academics, administration, and outreach activities are eligible to apply through Offline mode on or before 25 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application form are provided below.

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 60 years of age at the time of applying.
age_limit.details: Deputy Director: Not exceeding 60 years of age at the time of applying.

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum 5 years of experience as Professor, should have done at least 2 years as HoD / Dean, sufficient contribution in academics, administration and outreach activities, eminent person in his / her field of specialization with an outstanding academic record.
qualification.details: Deputy Director: Appointment shall be made from amongst the senior faculty members of the Institute on the recommendations of the Selection Committee as per provisions under Statute 23 (5) (a) of the NIT Statutes. Minimum 5 years of experience as Professor. Should have done at least 2 years as HoD / Dean. Sufficient contribution in academics, administration and outreach activities. Eminent person in his / her field of specialization with an outstanding academic record.

selection_process: Applications are invited from presently working Professors of Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology (VNIT) Nagpur. The appointment shall be made from amongst the senior faculty members of the Institute on the recommendations of the Selection Committee as per provisions under Statute 23 (5) (a) of the NIT Statutes. The appointment shall be for a period of three years initially which may be extended by two times for one year each on recommendation of the Board.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for VNIT Nagpur Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download VNIT Nagpur Deputy Director Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: VNIT Nagpur Deputy Director Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the VNIT Nagpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download VNIT Nagpur Deputy Director Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Deputy Director: Appointment shall be made from amongst the senior faculty members of the Institute on the recommendations of the Selection Committee as per provisions under Statute 23 (5) (a) of the NIT Statutes. Minimum 5 years of experience as Professor. Should have done at least 2 years as HoD / Dean. Sufficient contribution in academics, administration and outreach activities. Eminent person in his / her field of specialization with an outstanding academic record.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Deputy Director: Not exceeding 60 years of age at the time of applying.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Applications are invited from presently working Professors of Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology (VNIT) Nagpur. The appointment shall be made from amongst the senior faculty members of the Institute on the recommendations of the Selection Committee as per provisions under Statute 23 (5) (a) of the NIT Statutes. The appointment shall be for a period of three years initially which may be extended by two times for one year each on recommendation of the Board.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for VNIT Nagpur Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: VNIT Nagpur Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Deputy Director post at VNIT Nagpur?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Deputy Director position at VNIT Nagpur is 25th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Deputy Director role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a minimum of 5 years of experience as a Professor, with at least 2 years as HoD/Dean, and possess an outstanding academic record with significant contributions to academics, administration, and outreach.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for applying is not exceeding 60 years of age at the time of application.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Deputy Director position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. You need to download the form, fill it, attach necessary documents, and send it to the Registrar, VNIT Nagpur, before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type is Deputation.

faq.question: Q6. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is VNIT/Deputy-Director/2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this post?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Deputy Director post?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on the recommendations of a Selection Committee, as per the NIT Statutes, from amongst senior faculty members.

faq.question: Q9. What is the duration of the appointment?
faq.answer: The appointment is for an initial period of three years, which may be extended by two times for one year each upon recommendation.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
